channel.title: Human-Computer Interaction on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Human-Computer Interaction on CEDIS

item.title: Mental health app at Campus Gama: an undergraduate thesis delivers a tool designed with students in mind
item.description: Delziron Braz de Lima and Fellipe Pereira da Costa Silva defended at FCTE/UnB an undergraduate thesis developing an app to support mental health and well-being of students at Campus Gama.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Tcc by Delziron Braz de Lima, Fellipe Pereira da Costa Silva (2025).

item.title: Publications
item.description: This article proposes a pedagogical approach to teaching Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) in Software Engineering by combining heuristic evaluation, gamification, and project-based learning. Using questionnaires, statistical analysis, prototyping, and user validation, the method—based on the Octalysis framework—proved effective in improving interface quality and student engagement through educational (Role-Playing Game) RPG elements.
